comment: Local scale witnesses and terrestrial conditions for tests and applied calculator use. These are NOT baked into core geometry or Lean-derived quantities. Numbers here carry explicit source+error for arena scoring and test validation. Core src/ .py must never contain these literals.

sources.CMB_T0: Planck 2018 (arXiv:1807.06209); value and unc approx for test tolerance
sources.earth_surface_vacuum_mu0: CODATA 2018 vacuum permeability (exact in SI 2019 but value listed)
sources.proton_mass_for_local_anchor_MeV: PDG 2024; for test scale-witness comparison only (primary anchor remains Lean derivedProtonMass)
